query: SELECT id, title, imageUrl, category FROM articles WHERE category = 'GLOBAL' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AGjn9SpCJUmEG7Z.root --database 6wzLmWaAhQKjEBEoadSqJc --execute SELECT id, title, imageUrl, category FROM articles WHERE category = 'GLOBAL' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
